<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Ahmed Gamal Arfa — Data Analyst & AI Engineer</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #050810;
    --surface: #0a0f1e;
    --card: #0d1428;
    --cyan: #00d9ff;
    --cyan2: #00ffcc;
    --gold: #ffd166;
    --text: #e8f4f8;
    --muted: #5a7a8a;
    --border: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.15);
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    cursor: none;
  }

  /* Custom cursor */
  .cursor {
    position: fixed;
    width: 12px; height: 12px;
    background: var(--cyan);
    border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: transform 0.1s;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
  }
  .cursor-ring {
    position: fixed;
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    border: 1px solid var(--cyan);
    border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9998;
    transition: all 0.15s ease;
    opacity: 0.5;
  }

  /* Animated grid background */
  .grid-bg {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    animation: gridPulse 8s ease-in-out infinite;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  @keyframes gridPulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; }
    50% { opacity: 0.6; }
  }

  /* Floating particles */
  .particles { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; }
  .particle {
    position: absolute;
    width: 2px; height: 2px;
    background: var(--cyan);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: floatUp linear infinite;
    opacity: 0;
  }

  @keyframes floatUp {
    0% { transform: translateY(100vh) translateX(0); opacity: 0; }
    10% { opacity: 0.8; }
    90% { opacity: 0.8; }
    100% { transform: translateY(-10vh) translateX(30px); opacity: 0; }
  }

  /* Scanline effect */
  body::after {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
      0deg,
      transparent,
      transparent 2px,
      rgba(0,217,255,0.015) 2px,
      rgba(0,217,255,0.015) 4px
    );
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 10;
  }

  /* ===================== HERO ===================== */
  .hero {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 40px 20px;
  }

  .hero-inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
  }

  /* Photo section */
  .photo-wrap {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    animation: fadeInLeft 1s ease forwards;
    opacity: 0;
  }

  @keyframes fadeInLeft {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-40px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
  }

  .photo-frame {
    position: relative;
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
  }

  .photo-frame::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: -3px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cyan), var(--cyan2), var(--gold), var(--cyan));
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: spinGlow 4s linear infinite;
    background-size: 300% 300%;
    animation: gradientSpin 3s ease infinite;
  }

  @keyframes gradientSpin {
    0% { background-position: 0% 50%; filter: hue-rotate(0deg); }
    50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
    100% { background-position: 0% 50%; filter: hue-rotate(360deg); }
  }

  .photo-frame img {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 4px solid var(--bg);
    z-index: 1;
    filter: saturate(1.1) contrast(1.05);
  }

  /* Orbit rings */
  .orbit {
    position: absolute;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,217,255,0.2);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: spin linear infinite;
    top: 50%; left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  }
  .orbit-1 { width: 360px; height: 360px; animation-duration: 8s; }
  .orbit-2 { width: 420px; height: 420px; animation-duration: 14s; animation-direction: reverse; border-style: dashed; }

  @keyframes spin { from { transform: translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(0deg); } to { transform: translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(360deg); } }

  .orbit-dot {
    position: absolute;
    width: 8px; height: 8px;
    background: var(--cyan);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: -4px; left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--cyan);
  }

  /* Status badge */
  .status-badge {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 10px;
    right: -20px;
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--cyan2);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    z-index: 2;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .status-dot {
    width: 7px; height: 7px;
    background: var(--cyan2);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: blink 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  @keyframes blink { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.2; } }

  /* Hero text */
  .hero-text {
    animation: fadeInRight 1s ease 0.3s forwards;
    opacity: 0;
  }

  @keyframes fadeInRight {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(40px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
  }

  .hero-tag {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--cyan);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .hero-tag::before {
    content: '';
    width: 30px; height: 1px;
    background: var(--cyan);
  }

  .hero-name {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 56px);
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 0%, var(--cyan) 60%, var(--cyan2) 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .hero-role {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }

  .hero-bio {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    border-left: 2px solid var(--border);
    padding-left: 16px;
  }

  .hero-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 32px;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
  }

  .stat {
    text-align: center;
  }

  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--cyan);
    display: block;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--muted);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  .hero-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .btn {
    padding: 11px 24px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 12px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    text-decoration: none;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--cyan);
    color: var(--bg);
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .btn-primary::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: white;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }

  .btn-primary:hover::after { opacity: 0.15; }
  .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,217,255,0.4); }

  .btn-outline {
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--text);
    background: transparent;
  }

  .btn-outline:hover {
    border-color: var(--cyan);
    color: var(--cyan);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    background: rgba(0,217,255,0.05);
  }

  /* ===================== SECTIONS ===================== */
  section {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 100px 20px;
  }

  .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }

  .section-header {
    margin-bottom: 60px;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease both;
  }

  .section-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--cyan);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 42px);
    font-weight: 800;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff, var(--cyan));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  @keyframes fadeInUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  /* ===================== SKILLS ===================== */
  .skills-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 16px;
  }

  .skill-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 20px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s ease both;
  }

  .skill-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--cyan), var(--cyan2));
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }

  .skill-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .skill-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--cyan);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 20px rgba(0,217,255,0.1);
  }

  .skill-icon { font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .skill-name { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
  .skill-cat { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 4px; letter-spacing: 1px; }

  /* ===================== PROJECTS ===================== */
  .projects-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr));
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .project-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s ease both;
    position: relative;
  }

  .project-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--cyan);
    transform: translateY(-8px);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 30px rgba(0,217,255,0.15);
  }

  .project-img-wrap {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 200px;
  }

  .project-img-wrap img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.5s ease;
    filter: saturate(0.9);
  }

  .project-card:hover .project-img-wrap img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
    filter: saturate(1.1);
  }

  .project-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(5,8,16,0.95) 0%, transparent 60%);
  }

  .project-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px; right: 12px;
    background: rgba(0,217,255,0.15);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,217,255,0.3);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--cyan);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }

  .project-body { padding: 20px; }

  .project-title {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .project-desc {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .project-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }

  .tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }

  /* ===================== CONTACT ===================== */
  .contact-wrap {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 60px;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .contact-info h3 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .contact-info p {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  .contact-links { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }

  .contact-link {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 13px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .contact-link:hover {
    border-color: var(--cyan);
    color: var(--cyan);
    transform: translateX(6px);
  }

  .contact-icon { font-size: 18px; width: 24px; text-align: center; }

  /* Terminal box */
  .terminal {
    background: #060a14;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,217,255,0.2);
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  .terminal-bar {
    background: var(--card);
    padding: 10px 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .t-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; }
  .t-red { background: #ff5f56; }
  .t-yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
  .t-green { background: #27c93f; }
  .terminal-title { margin-left: 8px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); }

  .terminal-body { padding: 20px; line-height: 2; }
  .t-prompt { color: var(--cyan); }
  .t-cmd { color: var(--gold); }
  .t-output { color: var(--muted); padding-left: 16px; display: block; }
  .t-success { color: var(--cyan2); }

  .cursor-blink {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 8px; height: 14px;
    background: var(--cyan);
    animation: blink 1s step-end infinite;
    vertical-align: middle;
    margin-left: 2px;
  }

  /* Divider */
  .divider {
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--border), transparent);
    margin: 0 20px;
  }

  /* Footer */
  footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 40px 20px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  footer span { color: var(--cyan); }

  /* Responsive */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; text-align: center; }
    .photo-wrap { order: -1; }
    .hero-stats { justify-content: center; }
    .hero-links { justify-content: center; }
    .contact-wrap { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-tag { justify-content: center; }
    .orbit-1 { width: 310px; height: 310px; }
    .orbit-2 { width: 360px; height: 360px; }
  }

  /* Intersection observer animations */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(30px);
    transition: all 0.7s ease;
  }
  .reveal.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursorRing"></div>
<div class="grid-bg"></div>
<div class="particles" id="particles"></div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="photo-wrap">
      <div class="orbit orbit-1"><div class="orbit-dot"></div></div>
      <div class="orbit orbit-2"><div class="orbit-dot"></div></div>
      <div class="photo-frame">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Ahmed Gamal Arfa" />
      </div>
      <div class="status-badge">
        <div class="status-dot"></div>
        Available for hire
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-text">
      <div class="hero-tag">AI & Data Engineer</div>
      <h1 class="hero-name">Ahmed<br>Gamal Arfa</h1>
      <div class="hero-role">Data Analyst · ML Engineer</div>
      <p class="hero-bio">
        Trained under MCIT in AI & Data Analysis. I bridge the gap between complex data and actionable decisions — specializing in Data Pipelines, LLMs, RAG Systems, and Business Intelligence.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="stat">
          <span class="stat-num">4+</span>
          <span class="stat-label">Projects</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stat">
          <span class="stat-num">3+</span>
          <span class="stat-label">BI Tools</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stat">
          <span class="stat-num">ML</span>
          <span class="stat-label">& LLMs</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-links">
        <a href="https://arafa-a.lovable.app" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank">→ View Portfolio</a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ahmed-gamal-arfa" class="btn btn-outline" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
        <a href="mailto:anaarafa2019@gmail.com" class="btn btn-outline">Email Me</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header reveal">
      <div class="section-label">// 01. expertise</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Tech Stack</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="skills-grid">
      <div class="skill-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.1s">
        <div class="skill-icon">🐍</div>
        <div class="skill-name">Python</div>
        <div class="skill-cat">DATA & AI</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.15s">
        <div class="skill-icon">🗄️</div>
        <div class="skill-name">SQL</div>
        <div class="skill-cat">DATABASE</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.2s">
        <div class="skill-icon">📊</div>
        <div class="skill-name">Power BI</div>
        <div class="skill-cat">VISUALIZATION</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.25s">
        <div class="skill-icon">📈</div>
        <div class="skill-name">Tableau</div>
        <div class="skill-cat">VISUALIZATION</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.3s">
        <div class="skill-icon">🤖</div>
        <div class="skill-name">Scikit-learn</div>
        <div class="skill-cat">MACHINE LEARNING</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.35s">
        <div class="skill-icon">🔥</div>
        <div class="skill-name">PyTorch</div>
        <div class="skill-cat">DEEP LEARNING</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.4s">
        <div class="skill-icon">🧠</div>
        <div class="skill-name">LLMs / RAG</div>
        <div class="skill-cat">AI SYSTEMS</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.45s">
        <div class="skill-icon">📋</div>
        <div class="skill-name">Excel</div>
        <div class="skill-cat">ANALYTICS</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header reveal">
      <div class="section-label">// 02. work</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Featured Projects</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="projects-grid">

      <div class="project-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.1s">
        <div class="project-img-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Pizza Sales Dashboard" />
          <div class="project-overlay"></div>
          <span class="project-badge">POWER BI</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-title">Pizza Sales Dashboard</div>
          <p class="project-desc">Business intelligence solution analyzing KPIs, top products, sales by size, and monthly trends for a pizza chain. Featuring interactive filters by category and date.</p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="tag">Power BI</span>
            <span class="tag">DAX</span>
            <span class="tag">KPI Analysis</span>
            <span class="tag">BI</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.2s">
        <div class="project-img-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Advanced Pizza Analytics" />
          <div class="project-overlay"></div>
          <span class="project-badge">ADVANCED BI</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-title">Advanced Pizza Analytics</div>
          <p class="project-desc">Futuristic dark-theme dashboard with orbital visualizations, competitor analysis, payment method breakdowns, and 3D surface charts for multi-dimensional data insight.</p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="tag">Power BI</span>
            <span class="tag">Custom Visuals</span>
            <span class="tag">RAG Analysis</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.3s">
        <div class="project-img-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Retail Supply Chain Dashboard" />
          <div class="project-overlay"></div>
          <span class="project-badge">POWER BI</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-title">Retail Supply Chain Dashboard</div>
          <p class="project-desc">End-to-end retail analytics covering category performance, segment distribution, profit analysis by sub-category, and geographic mapping across regions.</p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="tag">Power BI</span>
            <span class="tag">Map Visual</span>
            <span class="tag">Segment Analysis</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card reveal" style="animation-delay:0.4s">
        <div class="project-img-wrap" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #050810, #0d1428); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
          <div style="text-align:center; padding:20px;">
            <div style="font-size:48px; margin-bottom:12px;">🤖</div>
            <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:700; color:var(--cyan);">LLM / RAG System</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:6px;">Intelligent Retrieval Engine</div>
          </div>
          <div class="project-overlay"></div>
          <span class="project-badge">AI / LLM</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-title">AI Retrieval System (RAG)</div>
          <p class="project-desc">Implementation of a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline enabling intelligent, context-aware responses from custom knowledge bases using state-of-the-art LLMs.</p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="tag">Python</span>
            <span class="tag">LangChain</span>
            <span class="tag">RAG</span>
            <span class="tag">LLMs</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header reveal">
      <div class="section-label">// 03. connect</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Get In Touch</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-wrap">
      <div class="contact-info reveal">
        <h3>Let's build something<br><span style="color:var(--cyan)">data-driven</span> together.</h3>
        <p>Open to data analyst roles, ML engineering positions, and AI/BI consulting projects. Let's turn your raw data into actionable intelligence.</p>
        <div class="contact-links">
          <a href="mailto:anaarafa2019@gmail.com" class="contact-link">
            <span class="contact-icon">✉</span>
            anaarafa2019@gmail.com
          </a>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ahmed-gamal-arfa" class="contact-link" target="_blank">
            <span class="contact-icon">💼</span>
            linkedin.com/in/ahmed-gamal-arfa
          </a>
          <a href="https://arafa-a.lovable.app" class="contact-link" target="_blank">
            <span class="contact-icon">🌐</span>
            arafa-a.lovable.app
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="terminal reveal" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
        <div class="terminal-bar">
          <div class="t-dot t-red"></div>
          <div class="t-dot t-yellow"></div>
          <div class="t-dot t-green"></div>
          <span class="terminal-title">ahmed@portfolio ~ bash</span>
        </div>
        <div class="terminal-body">
          <div><span class="t-prompt">➜ </span><span class="t-cmd">whoami</span></div>
          <span class="t-output">Ahmed Gamal Arfa</span>
          <br>
          <div><span class="t-prompt">➜ </span><span class="t-cmd">cat skills.txt</span></div>
          <span class="t-output">Python · SQL · Power BI · PyTorch</span>
          <span class="t-output">Scikit-learn · LLMs · RAG · Tableau</span>
          <br>
          <div><span class="t-prompt">➜ </span><span class="t-cmd">echo $STATUS</span></div>
          <span class="t-output t-success">✓ Available for new opportunities</span>
          <br>
          <div><span class="t-prompt">➜ </span><span class="t-cmd">send --hire ahmed<span class="cursor-blink"></span></span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p>Built with 💡 by <span>Ahmed Gamal Arfa</span> · "Turning data into insights and ideas into intelligent systems."</p>
</footer>

<script>
  // Custom cursor
  const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
  const ring = document.getElementById('cursorRing');
  let mx = 0, my = 0, rx = 0, ry = 0;

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY;
    cursor.style.left = mx - 6 + 'px';
    cursor.style.top = my - 6 + 'px';
  });

  function animRing() {
    rx += (mx - rx) * 0.12;
    ry += (my - ry) * 0.12;
    ring.style.left = rx - 18 + 'px';
    ring.style.top = ry - 18 + 'px';
    requestAnimationFrame(animRing);
  }
  animRing();

  document.querySelectorAll('a, button').forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { cursor.style.transform = 'scale(2)'; ring.style.transform = 'scale(1.5)'; });
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { cursor.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; ring.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; });
  });

  // Particles
  const particlesEl = document.getElementById('particles');
  for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
    const p = document.createElement('div');
    p.className = 'particle';
    p.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
    p.style.animationDuration = (8 + Math.random() * 12) + 's';
    p.style.animationDelay = (Math.random() * 15) + 's';
    p.style.width = p.style.height = (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 2 : 3) + 'px';
    particlesEl.appendChild(p);
  }

  // Reveal on scroll
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  reveals.forEach(r => obs.observe(r));
</script>
</body>
</html>
